allow: Bash(sshpass -p 'sukranflat7' ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=5 root@10.10.1.1 'uname -a; cat /etc/openwrt_release 2>/dev/null | head -3; mycoflowd --version 2>&1 | head -1 || true')

Bash(sshpass -p 'sukranflat7' ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no root@10.10.1.1 'uci show mycoflow | head -30; echo "---"; ls /usr/share/luci/menu.d/ | grep -i myco; ls /www/luci-static/resources/view/ 2>/dev/null | grep -i myco')
Bash(sshpass -p 'sukranflat7' ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no root@10.10.1.1 'cat /tmp/myco_state.json 2>/dev/null | head -50; echo "---"; md5sum /usr/bin/mycoflowd 2>/dev/null')

Bash(sshpass -p 'sukranflat7' ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no root@10.10.1.1 'stat -c "%y %n" /usr/bin/mycoflowd /www/luci-static/resources/view/mycoflow.js 2>/dev/null; echo "---"; grep -c "Active Flows" /www/luci-static/resources/view/mycoflow.js 2>/dev/null; echo "---"; grep -c "SERVICE_STYLES" /www/luci-static/resources/view/mycoflow.js 2>/dev/null')
